title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at South Indian Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at South Indian Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
